candidates.why: Explicit revenue label from candidate list, but appears unpopulated in preview and does not fit this rental-focused statement as well as the reported operating income line.
Balancing row, not an actual reported revenue line.
Could be a revenue-related line, but appears unpopulated and is not clearly the main top-line.
Explicitly marked non-revenue, so not suitable for REVT.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. Candidate list appears to miss the best reported top-line. 'Income' is the populated total line that equals 'Rental income' plus 'Other income' in the preview, so it is the closest available total revenue line. Manual review is needed because 'Income' is generic and may include non-core income in some years. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Income
No clear cost of goods sold / cost of sales line appears in this rental/property operating statement. Overhead and property operating costs are shown instead.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A label, but appears only sparsely populated.
Typical SG&A component and populated in several years.
Balance sheet accrual, not an income statement expense row, so not appropriate for XSGA expense mapping.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. An explicit SG&A row exists ('Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Other') but is mostly empty in the preview, so per rule it is included along with the closest overhead buckets for coverage across years. Additional relevant overhead rows ('Central Administration', 'Other external expenses', 'Property expenses') were chosen from the full preview because the candidate list was incomplete. Excluded subtotal 'Total Operating Expense' and excluded depreciation/amortization. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Central Administration, [Income Statement] Other external expenses, [Income Statement] Property expenses
No research and development expense line is present.

variables.notes: Priority list uses the most semantically correct interest-expense labels first, with 'Financial expenses' as a practical fallback because it is populated in multiple years. Excluded lease-interest supplemental row because it is only a component, not the preferred single reported line.

candidates.why: Direct equity line and populated across years.
Not equity; this is the full balance sheet total.

variables.notes: No populated parent/owners-only equity line is available; therefore 'Total equity' is used. To avoid double counting, MIB is set to [] because no separate balance-sheet non-controlling interest line is shown.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation item, not a balance sheet minority interest stock line.
Income statement total related to earnings attribution, not balance sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Not a minority interest balance sheet line.

variables.notes: No balance sheet non-controlling interest / minority interest line is present. Since BE uses 'Total equity', MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.
